item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang hanya menekankan kepentingan masyarakat bisa melenceng dari kebutuhan dasar warga.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that Indonesian collective and social-justice values often prioritize society over individual rights, but by turns 3 and 5 shifts into a rights-protection and implementation critique. Agent B stays near a balance position throughout, emphasizing coexistence of social equity and personal liberties, then noting both progress and inconsistent enforcement.
